description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements beyond basic tags like <div> and <span>, testing the ability to select appropriate tags for content structure. It is moderately challenging, using a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners to improve their markup skills. The quiz aims to gauge practical understanding of modern HTML best practices.
Topics: HTML5 semantic elements, Proper tag selection, Web accessibility basics, Modern markup conventions
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students who are comfortable with basic HTML and want to deepen their semantic markup expertise.
